name: Southern Acids M Bhd
summary: Southern Acids M Bhd is a Malaysia-based company primarily engaged in the manufacturing and sale of oleochemical products, as well as providing port services. The company's oleochemical products include fatty acids, glycerine, and soap noodles, which are used in various industries such as personal care, food, and industrial applications. Southern Acids M Bhd is headquartered in Klang, Selangor, Malaysia.
